lines.speaker: Poison Salesman
lines.text: I hear you're pretty smart to have solved the Sinclair Murder!

lines.speaker: Poison Salesman
lines.text: Howdy! Thanks for buying all that low alcohol beer from me! Now I have the funds to whip up a new batch of my patented multipurpose poison!

lines.speaker: Poison Salesman
lines.text: Maybe I can take your name and add it to my mailing list for potential purchasers of Peter Potter's patented multipurpose poison?
